name: ILDisturbAllNodeUpdateBits
title: ILDisturbAllNodeUpdateBits
description: The lowest two bits of this parameter are evaluated:
This value is used in combination with the disturbanceMode.
tables: Deprecated Function This function is deprecated and has been replaced by ILNodeDisturbAllNodesUpdateBits
Note This function is not available for all OEM packages — depends on the CANoeIL. This function can be used in a global node outside the node context of the IL.
long ILDisturbAllNodeUpdateBits (long flags, long disturbanceMode, long disturbanceCount, long disturbanceValue);

Modifies all update bits of signals/signal groups of all nodes in the current bus context. Different fault injections are possible.This function influences a simulation node with an assigned CANoe interaction layer.

flags The lowest two bits of this parameter are evaluated: 0 Update bits of signals and signal groups are disturbed. 1 Only signal update bits are disturbed. 2 Only signal group update bits are disturbed.
Update bits of signals and signal groups are disturbed.
Only signal update bits are disturbed.
Only signal group update bits are disturbed.
Update bits of signals and signal groups are disturbed.
Only signal update bits are disturbed.
Only signal group update bits are disturbed.

disturbanceMode Identifies the disturbance mode: 0 Value The disturbance uses the value in disturbanceValue as counter. 1 Freeze The current counter value is transmitted. 2 Random A random value is transmitted as counter.
The disturbance uses the value in disturbanceValue as counter.
The current counter value is transmitted.
A random value is transmitted as counter.
The disturbance uses the value in disturbanceValue as counter.
The current counter value is transmitted.
A random value is transmitted as counter.
disturbanceCount -1 Infinite. 0 Stops the disturbance, e.g.a infinite disturbance. n Number of disturbances.
Stops the disturbance, e.g.a infinite disturbance.
Stops the disturbance, e.g.a infinite disturbance.
disturbanceValue This value is used in combination with the disturbanceMode.
